series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of letters from state agencies designating certain positions as unclassified in accordance with Chapter 124.11(A)(8) of the Ohio Revised Code and copies of DAS SHRD letters of acknowledgment of receipt.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 10 years after date of submission, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain for 10 years after date of submission, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
